EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Successful password bruteforcing for Zabbix account {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} on host {event_src.host}. Number of failed login attempts: {count.subevents}.
Password bruteforcing attempts for Zabbix account {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} on host {event_src.host}. Number of login attempts: {count.subevents}.
